---
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

::: {style="text-align: center; color: #2ba9dc;"}
# Dow Jones News Fund Data Interns 2025

[(ver May 22, 2025)]{style="font-size: 8pt;"}
:::

::: {style="display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 20px; margin-top: 30px;"}
<img src="../images/DJNF_Logo.png" style="height: 170px; width: auto;"/>
<img src="../images/IRE_logo.png" style="height: 110px; width: auto;"/>
<img src="../images/Merrill_logo.png" style="height: 130px; width: auto;"/>
:::

::: {style="text-align: center; color: #2ba9dc;"}
:::

::: {style="float:right; padding:10px;"}
<img src="../images/interns/Sasha Allen.jpg" width="25%" height="25%" align="left" style="padding:10px;"/>
**Sasha Allen** studies at University of Maryland College Park and will
intern with the Connecticut Mirror.
:::

::: {style="float:right; padding:10px;"}
<img src="../images/interns/Hannah Bensen.jpg" width="25%" height="25%" align="left" style="padding:10px;"/>
**Hannah Bensen** studies at Stanford University and will intern with
the Washington Post through the Investigative Reporting Workshop. See
[Hannah's data
project.](https://djnf-data-2025.github.io/hannah-bensen/)
:::

::: {style="float:right; padding:10px;"}
<img src="../images/interns/Olivia Borgula.jpg" width="25%" height="25%" align="left" style="padding:10px;"/>
**Olivia Borgula** studies at University of Maryland, College Park and
will intern with the Advertising Specialty Institute newsroom. See [her
data project.](https://djnf-data-2025.github.io/olivia-borgula/)
:::

::: {style="float:right; padding:10px;"}
<img src="../images/interns/Declan Bradley.jpg" width="25%" height="25%" align="left" style="padding:10px;"/>
**Declan Bradley** studies at Reed College and will intern with the
Howard Center for Investigative Reporting newsroom. [Profile of Declan
by Levi
Jiang.](https://docs.google.com/document/d/101qUFtB46zNAwCP8MoTQNxHVwo2T3SqFSKPVOy7opTE/edit?usp=sharing)
:::

::: {style="float:right; padding:10px;"}
<img src="../images/interns/Emma Ferschweiler.png" width="25%" height="25%" align="left" style="padding:10px;"/>
**Emma Morgan Ferschweiler** studies at The College of New Jersey and
will intern with the New Jersey Advance Media.
:::

::: {style="float:right; padding:10px;"}
<img src="../images/interns/Cooper Gant.jpg" width="25%" height="25%" align="left" style="padding:10px;"/>
**Cooper Gant** studies at University of Arkansas and will intern with
the Arkansas Democrat Gazette.
:::

::: {style="float:right; padding:10px;"}
<img src="../images/interns/Nate Harrington.jpg" width="25%" height="25%" align="left" style="padding:10px;"/>
**Nathaniel Harrington** studies at Syracuse University and will intern
with WHYY.
:::

::: {style="float:right; padding:10px;"}
<img src="../images/interns/Ava Hu.jpg" width="25%" height="25%" align="left" style="padding:10px;"/>
**Ava (Xiaoman) Hu** studies at University of California, Berkeley and
will intern with the Houston Chronicle. Profile of Ava by Ethan Hylton
:::

::: {style="float:right; padding:10px;"}
<img src="../images/interns/Ethan Hylton.jpg" width="25%" height="25%" align="left" style="padding:10px;"/>
**Ethan James Hylton** studies at Goldsmiths, University of London and
will intern with the Indianapolis Star. [Ethan's profile by Ava
Hu.](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ztsovng3dKfH4jMs6eRNzFUwPZdt99iw5Eo2VsWrr7g/edit?usp=sharing)
:::

:::::::::: {style="float:right; padding:10px;"}
<img src="../images/interns/Levi Jiang.jpg" width="25%" height="25%" align="left" style="padding:10px;"/>
**Levi Jiang** studies at University of Washington and will intern with
the Philadelphia Inquirer.

<div>

::: {style="float:right; padding:10px;"}
<img src="../images/interns/Lauren Lifke.jpg" width="25%" height="25%" align="left" style="padding:10px;"/>
**Lauren Lifke** studies at University of New Mexico and will intern
with the Maryland Matters newsroom. [Profile of Lauren by Hannah
Bensen](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1KpAog5S57ONW_B18uNwXz1jLak-QbnuF_yoanXDA8VA/edit?usp=sharing)
:::

::: {style="float:right; padding:10px;"}
<img src="../images/interns/Apurva Mahajan.png" width="25%" height="25%" align="left" style="padding:10px;"/>
**Apurva Mahajan** studies at University of Maryland and will intern
with the The Detroit News. [Apurva's profile by Yasmeen
Saadi.](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1l-0mNqCJ0oDHyfGD1MtxuuEh6RJxjlopVWAJEzF3v-Y/edit?tab=t.0)
:::

::: {style="float:right; padding:10px;"}
<img src="../images/interns/Patrick McCaslin.jpg" width="25%" height="25%" align="left" style="padding:10px;"/>
**Patrick McCaslin** studies at University of Miami and will intern with
the Baltimore Banner. [Profile of Patrick by Nate
Harrington.](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1cGbEk3aE87GiOsoSYUqH3230IFsffTtUAEd9hVmpjpk/edit?usp=drivesdk)
:::

::: {style="float:right; padding:10px;"}
<img src="../images/interns/Sophia Nabours.jpg" width="25%" height="25%" align="left" style="padding:10px;"/>
**Sophia Nabours** studies at University of Arkansas and will intern
with the The Marshall Project. [Profile of Sophia by Sasha
Allen.](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1w13eQ6WBpSC_pp6u_maU90IBDucs4X2ryKBWNmw-3Po/edit?usp=sharing)
:::

:::: {style="float:right; padding:10px;"}
<img src="../images/interns/Diego Perdomo.jpg" width="25%" height="25%" align="left" style="padding:10px;"/>
**Diego Perdomo** studies at University of Florida and will intern with
the Futuro Media. [Read his profile by Olivia
Borgula](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1iP5efSFNN2lFfGRhU3VZnD5M65P93Tsky_oeqvTgDno/edit?usp=sharing)

::: {style="float:right; padding:10px;"}
<img src="../images/interns/Yasmeen Saadi.jpg" width="25%" height="25%" align="left" style="padding:10px;"/>
**Yasmeen Saadi** studies at University of Missouri-Columbia and will
intern with the Investigative Project on Race and Equity newsroom. [Here
is Yasmeen's data project for the
week.](https://djnf-data-2025.github.io/yasmeen-saadi/)
:::
::::

</div>
::::::::::
